testcase.name: Map Page Load › MapLibre canvas renders within timeout

failure.message: mapping.spec.ts:58:3 MapLibre canvas renders within timeout

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › mapping.spec.ts:58:3 › Map Page Load › MapLibre canvas renders within timeout ───────
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('.maplibregl-map').first() Expected: visible Timeout: 20000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 20000ms - waiting for locator('.maplibregl-map').first()
at page-objects\MapPage.ts:39
37 | 38 | async expectMapLoaded() { > 39 | await expect(this.mapContainer).toBeVisible({ timeout: 20_000 }); | ^ 40 | // Give MapLibre time to initialise tiles 41 | await this.page.waitForTimeout(2_000); 42 | } at MapPage.expectMapLoaded (C:\Users\a.eraly\AdventureLog\frontend\tests\e2e\page-objects\MapPage.ts:39:37) at MapPage.gotoMap (C:\Users\a.eraly\AdventureLog\frontend\tests\e2e\page-objects\MapPage.ts:35:16) at C:\Users\a.eraly\AdventureLog\frontend\tests\e2e\mapping.spec.ts:60:5

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: Collection Map Integration › collection detail page loads without JS errors
Mapping API › GET /api/adventures/ returns 200 via the SvelteKit proxy
Map Accessibility › map page has a visible heading or landmark
